title: Add Deco Spacio to build
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Deco Spacio](https://deco-spacio.vercel.app/) to build
- Generates AI interior concepts using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, with Pollinations imagery and optional Supabase storage.

Fixes #11771

gist.headline: Deco Spacio joins the hive
gist.blurb: Deco Spacio just landed in our community greenhouse! It's a slick Next.js app that generates beautiful AI interior design concepts using Pollinations.
gist.summary: Added Deco Spacio, a Next.js and Tailwind CSS application that generates AI interior design concepts using Pollinations imagery, to the community apps directory.
gist.impact: Builders can now explore Deco Spacio in the community greenhouse to see how Pollinations can be integrated into a full-stack interior design concept generator.
gist.visual_concept: Interior design and architecture. Polly the bee acting as an interior designer, arranging furniture or looking at a room layout, representing the Deco Spacio app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny painter's beret, arranging miniature pixelated furniture on a glowing lime green (#ecf874) room blueprint. A chunky retro monitor nearby displays a beautiful interior design concept. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm and creative.
